title: BIC — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Business Integrity Commission (BIC) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the BIC Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nyc.gov/site/bic, and the Salesforce Experience Cloud licensing portal (bicportal.nyc.gov). Includes the NYC geography spine and BIC's own account key (BIC NUMBER).

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

Address.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (address.json#/$defs/Address); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Address still resolve.

AccountReference.description: A reference to a BIC-regulated business account by its BIC number and names.

bicNumber.description: 'BIC NUMBER' — BIC's primary account key for a licensee/registrant/market business.

Industry.description: The BIC-regulated industry an account operates in.

ApplicationType.description: Application / credential type ('APPLICATION TYPE'): license, registration, exemption, or renewal.
